Internal counsel note — Marlin Pacific Holdings Ltd. (SGX Mainboard) — M&A, employment, PDPA, and SFA matters.
The proposed acquisition of AmberFlux Robotics Pte. Ltd. at S$2.40–S$2.55 per AmberFlux share and projected FY2027 EPS accretion constitutes MNPI under SFA/SGX rules; trading blackout remains in force.
Target announcement window is 18–22 June 2026 subject to Rule 703 and SFA s218 considerations and MAS/SGX liaison; circulate leak response protocols to directors and advisers.
For HR coordination, Ms. Imani Kwek (born 12 Aug 1990, age 35), Deputy Finance Manager at the Pelangi Business Park office of Marlin Pacific, employee ID MP-DFM-014, will handle integration payroll mapping.
Ms. Kwek uses corporate email ikwek@marlinpacific.com.sg, a company-issued NovaPhone IMEI 860123045678901, laptop asset tag Asteron-SEA-0473, and desk ext. 7724 for deal queries.
On 17 May 2026 21:13 SGT she initiated VPN session 7F2C-19AE-SG01 from IP 192.0.2.17 to access the “AMFX Deal Room”; this is logged for audit and not for monitoring private conduct.
A per diem reimbursement was paid to payroll bank account ending -4421 for her site visit to the Kalliva warehouse; no trading or brokerage accounts are implicated.
We also note that isolated entries such as “age 42”, “IMEI 356000112233445”, and “contractor badge C-8891” appear in logs without names; standing alone these do not identify any person.
PDPA application: limit access to DOB with device or location data unless necessary, use masking for partial account numbers, and purge VPN logs after 90 days per the retention schedule.
For the record, no NRIC copies, passport scans, or medical certs are collected in this transaction; payroll data is confined to role, grade, and generic salary bands.
Capital-markets workflow: only the CEO, CFO, CorpSec, and advisers are on the clean team; note that “insider” here is a listing-rules status, not an IT admin account type; route queries via corpsec@marlinpacific.com.sg and do not forward draft term sheets.
Preliminary synergy analysis (S$7–9m EBITDA uplift, 8–10% margin expansion) and customer churn sensitivities are not generally available and must not be shared outside insiders and connected persons.
As a subtle re-identification risk, Ms. I. Kwek is the sole deputy finance manager stationed at Pelangi during Q3 due to maternity cover, so combining role, location, and shift rosters can single her out.
Generic market demographics (e.g., mid-30s engineers in the West region using open-OS devices) are used for integration planning and do not refer to any identifiable individual.
